checks.name: No module imports from higher layers
No file I/O in optimizer/graph/parser layers

details.dependency_graph: PASS - No file write operations found
details.context_optimizer: PASS - No file write operations found (comment reference only)
details.parsers: PASS - No file write operations found (only read source files which is their job)

details.centralized_control: YES - All phases executed in execute_full_pipeline method

details.fallback_found: YES - orchestrator.py line 525 has fallback prompt if manager fails
details.fallback_justification: Acceptable - fallback ensures system doesn't crash if prompt file missing
details.version_tracking: YES - prompt version logged in pipeline results

details.note: Lists are immutable references, content can't be modified due to frozen=True

usage_locations: Compatibility function in app/llm/__init__.py for tests
details.consistent_interface: YES - All usage through TokenEstimator interface

details.sequential_execution: YES - Phase 6 called after Phase 5 completes

checks.name: CLI and API call only service layer

minor_imports: from app.dependency_graph.graph_builder import GraphBuilder (for type hints)
from app.translation.orchestrator import TranslationOrchestrator (for type hints)
from app.validation import ValidationEngine (for type hints)
from app.audit import AuditEngine (for type hints)
api_routes.actual_usage: All routes call pipeline_service.execute_full_pipeline() - NO DIRECT USAGE
api_routes.severity: LOW - Imports are for type hints only, not direct instantiation

cli.severity: MEDIUM - CLI should be refactored to use PipelineService

violations.issue: Direct imports of parsers, graph_builder, optimizer, gemini_client
violations.recommendation: Refactor CLI to use PipelineService.execute_full_pipeline() instead of direct component instantiation

details.config_usage: All modules use get_settings() to access configuration
details.no_hardcoded_configs: YES - All config values come from Settings

recommendations.issue: CLI directly imports and instantiates low-level components
recommendations.recommendation: Refactor CLI commands to use PipelineService.execute_full_pipeline() instead of manually orchestrating components. This ensures consistency between API and CLI execution paths.
recommendations.impact: Improves maintainability and ensures both API and CLI use the same tested pipeline logic

recommendations.issue: Type hint imports from service components
recommendations.recommendation: Consider using TYPE_CHECKING guard to make it clear these are type-only imports
recommendations.impact: Minor - improves code clarity but doesn't affect runtime behavior

conclusion: Backend architecture is CORRECT with minor improvements needed. All critical architectural principles are enforced: layered architecture, interface-driven design, centralized configuration, immutable data structures, and proper separation of concerns. The only issue is CLI not using PipelineService, which should be refactored for consistency.
